# Copilot Instructions for ATLAS

- Keep changes minimal and reversible.
- Respect local-first constraints.
- Avoid risky commands and secrets.

## Forbidden changes

- Do not access D:\ATLAS while D: drive is unhealthy
- Do not write to D: drive
- Do not use BenimFormum as the current pilot project
- Do not read .env files
- Do not read private keys, SSH keys, keystores, or browser profiles
- Do not add unrestricted terminal execution
- Do not add git push automation
- Do not add production deploy automation
- Do not enable full disk MCP access
- Do not implement autonomous coding agents in V1
